_comment: Curated full-body person-detection models for the 'person' category (whole-silhouette blur). ONNX exports published by the onnx-community org on Hugging Face; downloads are SHA-256 verified against the pinned hashes below (computed from the exact files validated during development). NOTE the AGPL-3.0 license on the YOLOv10 family: models are downloaded on demand and NEVER bundled with OpenScrub (same policy as the non-commercial SCRFD face model) - the license badge is shown in the model picker so users can make their own call.

models.label: YOLOv10-N (nano - fast, good default)
models.attribution: YOLOv10 (THU-MIG, arXiv:2405.14458), ONNX export by onnx-community. AGPL-3.0.
models.notes: 9 MB. NMS-free end2end export; detects whole bodies for the person (full-body blur) category. COCO-trained; OpenScrub keeps only the person class.

models.label: YOLOv10-S (small - more accurate)
models.attribution: YOLOv10 (THU-MIG, arXiv:2405.14458), ONNX export by onnx-community. AGPL-3.0.
models.notes: 31 MB. Higher recall on small/distant or partially occluded people; a little slower per frame.
